form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently came from midfield; 2nd of 7 at Wyong Prov Cl1 on March 28 over 1350m, on a slow track; neck behind Olivia Twist carrying 57kg at $1.55. Before that 3rd of 9 at Hawkesbury Cl1 on March 7 over 1300m, slow going 1.2 len behind Seastraand carrying 56.5kg at $6.50. Rock hard fit and is one of the better chances.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly. Raced wide and without cover throughout.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming ran last of 8 at Kembla Grange Cl1 on February 24 over 1200m, 13 len behind Rivendell with 59.5kg at $16. Second-up 4th of 9 at Kembla Grange Prov Cl1 on March 21 over 1400m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Kitty Okay carrying 59kg at $16. Blinkers on and should be peaking at the third run back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and then bumped by Flats.
From an outside barrier, shifted behind runners in the early stages.
Near the 150m, tightened and carried in by Shidan.
Raced keenly in the lead through the middle stages.

form.formComment: At the latest run won by 0.5 len at Hawkesbury 4yo+ Mdn-Sw March 17 over 1500m defeating Derry City Felix carrying 59kg at $3.20. The start before that 5th of 8 at Kembla Grange Mid Mdn on February 24 over 1500m, 3.5 len behind El Qasabi carrying 57kg at $7.50. Facing a stiffer test this time but looks up to the task.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly.
Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.
On jumping shifted in and made contact with Affermato.
Approaching the 100m, laid in.
On straightening, shifting out in search of superior ground.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 10 at this track Prov Bm64 on March 12 over 1400m, 1.3 len behind Benamera with 55.5kg at $11. Second run from a spell raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 10 at this track Cl1 on March 31 over 1500m, 1.2 len behind Is It Spectacular with 56kg at $15. Fitter now and she is nicely treated after Small's claim.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 150m, shifted out when not clear, hampering Sunsprite.
Began awkwardly shifted out and bumped Thaibeefsalade.
Shifted out on jumping and made contact with Serpico.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At big odds at debut, second last in a small field at Kembla Grange Super Mdn-Sw on March 3 over 1200m, on rain affected going; 6 len behind Royal Silver carrying 58.5kg at $31. Second-up came from midfield and won by a head at Goulburn Super Mdn March 22 over 1300m on a rain affected track defeating Capital Babe with 58kg at $12. Up in trip today and is open to further improvement.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6.5). Had two starts to date. Second-up came from midfield and won by a head at Goulburn Super Mdn March 22 over 1300m on a rain affected track defeating Capital Babe with 58kg at $12. Up in trip today and is open to further improvement.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping by Iron Legend.
Slow to begin and soon after hampered by Red Deer.
On jumping shifted in and bumped Sharbino and lost ground.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 3rd of 9 at Port Macquarie F&M Cl1 on March 24 over 1200m, slow going 1.4 len behind Shoutaboutit with 58.5kg at $1.80. Previously second-up made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 11 at Muswellbrook Mdn-Sw on November 2 over 1280m, on a slow track; 2.25 len behind African Diamond carrying 55.5kg at $2.20. Promising filly who is expected to be in the finish again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over the final few strides, carried Toussaint out.
Raced keenly in the middle stages.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months made ground from midfield; 3rd of 12 at Muswellbrook Bm58 on March 27 over 1280m, slow going 3 len behind Siragusa with 58.5kg at $4.60. Previously second-up 2nd of 8 at Beaumont (Newcastle) Cl1 on October 27 over 1350m, nose behind Dreymon carrying 55.5kg at $4.80. Back in good shape and makes each-way appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 200m, laid in and away from Dreymon despite the efforts of its rider.
Began awkwardly.
Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.
